title: Lowering Costs for Caregivers Act of 2025
short_title: Lowering Costs for Caregivers Act of 2025
plain_summary: This bill makes it easier for people to help pay for their parents' medical bills. Starting in 2025, workers can use money from their special health savings accounts and workplace health programs to cover their parents' healthcare costs. Before this law, people had to pay extra taxes if they used this money for their parents' medical expenses. Now they won't have to pay those extra taxes, which will save money for families who are taking care of their aging parents.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Ways and Means.
plain_keywords: tax free money for parents healthcare
help aging parents with medical costs
adult children paying parents medical expenses
taking care of elderly parents costs

sections.title: Section 1 Short Title
sections.text: This law can be called the Lowering Costs for Caregivers Act of two thousand twenty five.

sections.title: Section 2 Health Savings Accounts
sections.text: This section changes the rules for Health Savings Accounts. A Health Savings Account is a special bank account that lets people save money tax-free for medical expenses. Right now, people can use money from these accounts to pay for medical care for themselves and their spouse. This law adds parents to that list. Starting after December thirty first two thousand twenty four, people can also use their Health Savings Account money to pay for medical care for their parents or their spouse's parents.

sections.title: Section 3 Flexible Spending and Health Reimbursement Arrangements
sections.text: This section changes the rules for two types of workplace health benefit programs. Flexible Spending Arrangements let workers set aside money from their paychecks before taxes to pay for medical expenses. Health Reimbursement Arrangements are accounts that employers fund to help workers pay for medical costs. Right now, these programs mainly cover the worker and their family members. This law says that these programs can also be used to pay for medical care for the worker's parents or their spouse's parents. Workers will not have to pay extra taxes when they use this money for their parents' medical care. This change applies to medical expenses that happen after December thirty first two thousand twenty four.

sections.title: Section 4 Archer MSAs
sections.text: This section changes the rules for Archer Medical Savings Accounts. These are older types of health savings accounts that are similar to Health Savings Accounts but were created earlier and have different rules. Just like with Health Savings Accounts, this law allows people to use money from their Archer Medical Savings Account to pay for medical care for their parents or their spouse's parents. This change applies to money paid for medical care after December thirty first two thousand twenty four.
